"[16] 72-1 ADV NEG ON PUSHING VEH - ONLY THING WILL BE IS THAT CT WILL HAVE TO PLOW AROUND VEH - WILL PLACE CONES OUT CAL-NV CAN REPSOND IN THE MORNING - 98 "
"[15] CAL/NV INQ IF THE VEH CAN BE PUSHED TO THE SIDE TO BE PICKED UP IN THE MORNING"
"[27] [Appended, 02:19:31] [9] VEH ONE IN THE SAME AS LOG 153"
"[13] [Rotation Request Comment] 1039 CAL-NV ETA - DRIVE TIME FROM TONHAPA"
"[12] C72-001 MR KS ONLY ABLE TO HANDLE 8,000 LBS // VEH IS 11,000 LBS GROSS WEIGHT // VEH IS A FORD ECONOLINE TURNED INTO A MINNIE WINNEBAGO"
"[8] C72-001 ACCORDING TO MR KS - THEY ARE UNABLE TO HANDLE // REQ HD 1185"
"[7] LATE ENTRY: 72-1 REQ 1185 AT 00:27 - 28 FROM LINE 4 IS 1124, REQ 1185, LIGHT DUTY SHOULD BE ABLE TO HANDLE"
"[5] [Rotation Request Comment] 1039 MR K"
"[1] 2 BIG RIGS AND A CAMPER 1125 IN THE #2 // NB 1/4 MI JNO OF"
"[22] [Appended, 02:19:31] [4] RP HAS ARRANGEMENTS MADE TO HAVE VEH TOWED EITHER TONIGHT OR TOMORROW"

details.IncidentDetail: "[2] 55-CZP1 SB 405 FM THE 605 TO THE 22 -- #1/2/3/4 CLOSED - TAKING THE FT @ 2300"
